auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: Calendly personal access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it from API & Webhooks in the Calendly Integrations page: https://calendly.com/integrations/api_webhooks

actions.name: cancel_scheduled_event
actions.description: Cancel one Calendly scheduled event by scheduled-event URI.

scheduledEventUri.description: The Calendly scheduled event URI returned by the API.

reason.description: The human-readable reason to cancel the scheduled event.

canceled.description: Whether Calendly accepted the canceled request.

outputSchema.description: The response wrapper for a Calendly scheduled-event cancellation.

actions.name: create_event_invitee
actions.description: Create one Calendly invitee booking for a confirmed available start time.

eventTypeUri.description: The Calendly event type URI returned by the API.

startTime.description: The scheduled start time to book in ISO 8601 format.

name.description: The full name of the primary invitee to book.

firstName.description: The invitee first name to submit with the booking.

lastName.description: The invitee last name to submit with the booking.

email.description: The email address of the primary invitee to book.

timezone.description: The IANA timezone of the primary invitee.

textReminderNumber.description: The E.164 phone number to use for invitee text reminders when Calendly supports them.

invitee.description: The primary invitee profile used to create one Calendly booking.

items.description: One guest email address to add to the booking.

eventGuests.description: The guest email addresses to add to the booking.

question.description: The custom question label to answer when creating the booking.

answer.description: The answer to submit for the custom question.

position.description: The zero-based custom-question position expected by Calendly.

items.description: One custom question answer to submit when creating the booking.

questionsAndAnswers.description: The answers to custom questions to submit with the booking.

tracking.description: The tracking payload to associate with the booking.

location.description: The location payload to submit with the booking when Calendly requires it.

outputSchema.description: The response wrapper for invitee.

actions.name: create_invitee_no_show
actions.description: Mark one Calendly invitee as a no-show by invitee URI.

inviteeUri.description: The Calendly invitee URI returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response wrapper for inviteeNoShow.

actions.name: create_organization_invitation
actions.description: Create one organization invitation for a Calendly organization.

organizationUri.description: The Calendly organization URI returned by the API.

email.description: The email address to invite to the organization.

outputSchema.description: The response wrapper for organizationInvitation.

actions.name: create_share
actions.description: Create one customized single-use share from an existing Calendly event type.

eventTypeUri.description: The Calendly event type URI returned by the API.

name.description: The custom display name to use for the share.

duration.description: The custom meeting duration to use for the share.

items.description: One allowed duration option to expose on the share.

durationOptions.description: The allowed duration options to expose on the share.

periodType.description: The booking window type to apply to the share.

maxBookingTime.description: The maximum booking window to apply to the share.

hideLocation.description: Whether the share hides the location until booking time.

location.description: The textual location value configured on the share.

additionalInfo.description: Additional instructions configured on the share location.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number configured on the share location.

position.description: The display position of the share location.

items.description: One location configuration to apply to the share.

locationConfigurations.description: The location configurations to apply to the share.

timezone.description: The timezone of the availability override.

user.description: The Calendly user URI returned by the API.

share.description: The share resource returned by Calendly.

outputSchema.description: The response wrapper for share.

actions.name: create_single_use_scheduling_link
actions.description: Create one single-use scheduling link from an existing Calendly event type without customization.

eventTypeUri.description: The Calendly event type URI returned by the API.

schedulingLink.description: A Calendly single-use scheduling link resource.

outputSchema.description: The response wrapper for schedulingLink.

actions.name: create_webhook_subscription
actions.description: Create one Calendly webhook subscription for an organization or one user.

url.description: The callback URL that should receive Calendly webhook deliveries.

scope.description: The webhook subscription scope to create.

organizationUri.description: The Calendly organization URI returned by the API.

userUri.description: The Calendly user URI returned by the API.

items.description: One Calendly webhook event value supported by this connector.

events.description: The webhook event values to subscribe to.

webhookSubscription.description: One Calendly webhook subscription returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response wrapper for webhookSubscription.

actions.name: list_event_invitees

status.description: The invitee status filter accepted by Calendly.

pageToken.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous page.

sort.description: The sort expression accepted by Calendly for invitees.

count.description: The number of items returned in the current page.

anyOf.description: The URL for the next page, or null when there is no next page.

The URL for the previous page, or null when there is no previous page.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Calendly list endpoints.
